ground_truth.title: Recent updates | DART – Deloitte Accounting Research Tool
ground_truth.main_content: The Recent Updates page of the Deloitte Accounting Research Tool (DART) appears to be a dynamic listing page intended to display recent updates to accounting standards, regulatory changes, and professional guidance. However, no actual update content is present in the provided HTML. The page includes navigation to various sections including Accounting (with sub-sections for Codification, FASB, SEC, Government, and Archive), Auditing (AICPA, PCAOB, Other), Publications (Deloitte publications, Roadmap series, Archive), News, and Help resources. This is a professional research portal for accounting and auditing professionals seeking access to US GAAP, SEC regulations, and related professional standards.
with: Deloitte Accounting Research Tool (DART) provides access to accounting and auditing standards.
The Recent Updates page serves as a listing for recent changes to professional standards.
This resource covers US GAAP, SEC regulations, FASB standards, and AICPA guidance.
The platform includes navigation to Accounting, Auditing, Publications, News, and Help sections.
Deloitte offers publications such as On the Radar, Heads Up, and Financial Reporting Alerts.
